description: Motra is an iOS and Apple Watch fitness app that automatically detects exercises and counts reps from smartwatch motion data. It provides workout tracking, AI-generated routines, and related fitness features for consumers.
summary: Motra exposes a public remote MCP server at `https://mcp.motra.com/mcp`, authenticated with OAuth; no public HTTP/REST, GraphQL, or CLI developer surfaces were found on motra.com.
